name: Kahlua Chocolate Nut Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, sift together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
3. In another large bowl, cream the butter and brown sugar until light and fluffy.
4. Beat in the egg, then stir in the Kahlua.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture, stirring until just combined.
6. Fold in the chocolate pieces and chopped walnuts.
7. Grease a 7 x 11-inch baking pan.
8. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and spread evenly.
9. Bake for 30 minutes or until the top springs back when lightly touched in the center. Do not overbake.
10. Remove from oven and let cool for 15 minutes.
11. Brush the top with the remaining tablespoon of Kahlua.
12. Frost when completely cooled.
